name: Valve
purpose: DataLake 수도꼭지 — 사내 API 에서 데이터를 뽑아 S3 로 흘려 flow 에 공급
tagline: turn the valve · feed the flow

changelog.title: initial skeleton — Mock lake_api + Probe-First planner + asyncio executor(3 concurrent) + atomic S3 uploader + SSE state + web config
changes: core/lake_api.py: Mock query(params, custom_col, user) + Real adapter + rate limit + retry(HY000 재시도) + timeout(4분50초)
core/planner.py: Sample Window probe(1시간 샘플 → 하루 추정) + 7일 cache + shard-balanced chunking
core/executor.py: asyncio worker pool max_concurrent=3 + staging parquet + completeness check + timeout fallback
core/s3_up.py: atomic put (tmp → final rename) + fake_local_path 모드 (개발 즉시 가능)
core/state.py: jobs.jsonl append-only + SSE broadcast + crash recovery(in_progress→pending)
config 웹 CRUD (secret_key 는 write-only 마스킹)
rolling backfill_days 기본 3 (3~5 조정 가능), daily replace
